data.name: Wedding Witch
data.detailed_description:
婚禮女巫是一款動作Roguelike遊戲，在遊戲中，你要探索隨機生成的地圖，與惡魔戰鬥，尋找魅魔的魔水。

魅魔的魔水隱藏在充滿惡魔的迷宮森林中。完成各種挑戰，找到魔水吧！



喝下魅魔魔水的女巫的部分身體會有變化。你喜歡怎樣的女巫呢？



女巫每次喝下魅魔的魔水，都會獲得一種新魔法。創造你自己的獨創組合吧！

在迷宮森林中，有一些具有神秘力量的魔法花朵。將這些花朵用於女巫的花束，以獲得新力量！



找到魅魔的魔水，逃出迷宮森林，走向圓滿結局吧！
data.about_the_game:
婚禮女巫是一款動作Roguelike遊戲，在遊戲中，你要探索隨機生成的地圖，與惡魔戰鬥，尋找魅魔的魔水。

魅魔的魔水隱藏在充滿惡魔的迷宮森林中。完成各種挑戰，找到魔水吧！



喝下魅魔魔水的女巫的部分身體會有變化。你喜歡怎樣的女巫呢？



女巫每次喝下魅魔的魔水，都會獲得一種新魔法。創造你自己的獨創組合吧！

在迷宮森林中，有一些具有神秘力量的魔法花朵。將這些花朵用於女巫的花束，以獲得新力量！



找到魅魔的魔水，逃出迷宮森林，走向圓滿結局吧！
data.short_description: 這裡有一個想嫁給你的女巫。她決定尋找魅魔的魔水來誘惑你。但是，充滿惡魔的迷宮森林擋住了她的去路…她能否找到魅魔的魔水，並擁有一個幸福的婚禮嗎？
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 韓文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文

最低配備:

  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or newer, 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-6100 / AMD FX-8350
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD: HD 6570
  • DirectX: 版本：8.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Wedding Witch
data.detailed_description:
Wedding Witch is a rogue-like game that involves exploring randomly generated maps, fighting against hordes of devils, and finding the Succubus's potions.

The Succubus's potions are hidden somewhere in a dark forest filled with devils. Solve various tasks in order to find the potions!



Drinking the Succubus's potions will make the witch's body transform. What kind of witch do you desire?



The witch gains access to new spells whenever she drinks the Succubus's potions. Create your own spell combinations!

Magical flowers containing mysterious energies bloom in the labyrinthine forest. Add them to your bouquet and gain new powers!



Find the Succubus's potions, escape the forest, and earn your happy ending!
data.about_the_game:
Wedding Witch is a rogue-like game that involves exploring randomly generated maps, fighting against hordes of devils, and finding the Succubus's potions.

The Succubus's potions are hidden somewhere in a dark forest filled with devils. Solve various tasks in order to find the potions!



Drinking the Succubus's potions will make the witch's body transform. What kind of witch do you desire?



The witch gains access to new spells whenever she drinks the Succubus's potions. Create your own spell combinations!

Magical flowers containing mysterious energies bloom in the labyrinthine forest. Add them to your bouquet and gain new powers!



Find the Succubus's potions, escape the forest, and earn your happy ending!
data.short_description: Here is a witch who wants nothing but to marry you. She decides to seek potions from a certain Succubus in order to charm you... but a labyrinthine forest filled with devils stands in her way. Will she be able to find the potions, and with them, her happy ending?
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Korean, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
